mainEntity.name: How does Utah workers' comp differ from Idaho for chemical exposure claims?
mainEntity.text: How does Utah workers' comp differ from Idaho for chemical exposure claims?

acceptedAnswer.text: Utah emphasizes medical proof for diseases (6-yr limit); Idaho uses 'arising out of' test with 1-yr filing from disability, higher wage replacement (75%).

suggestedAnswer.text: Utah caps at 66 2/3% wages, Idaho 75%; both cover toxics but Idaho easier for psych claims. Cross-state workers in Boise/West Valley face jurisdiction fights. Choose domiciled state. Local firms clarify venue for max benefits—insurers exploit confusion.

name: Utah vs Idaho Chemical Exposure Workers' Comp Differences
description: Utah emphasizes medical proof for diseases (6-yr limit); Idaho uses 'arising out of' test with 1-yr filing from disability, higher wage replacement (75%).
